text: Implemented determinant.adgeMatrix plus S4 determinant methods and base-namespace S3 registration so base::det(adgeMatrix) works without Matrix attached. Added new regression test file and added det coverage to the existing matrix-generic subprocess suite. Validation: direct failing probe now passes; targeted subprocess tests pass; R CMD build passes; installed tarball det probe passes; LC_ALL=C R CMD check --no-tests --no-examples --ignore-vignettes exits with only pre-existing local compiler/backend-probe warning/note.
